# Shoofly

> Drop-in runtime security for OpenClaw and Claude Code agents. Threats intercepted before they execute -- blocked, not detected.

Shoofly is a security layer for OpenClaw and Claude Code agents that intercepts tool calls before they execute and blocks dangerous ones. It detects and blocks prompt injection, credential exfiltration, out-of-scope writes, runaway loops, and data exfiltration attempts.

## What It Does

Shoofly sits between an OpenClaw agent and its tools. Every tool call -- file writes, shell commands, web requests, API calls -- is evaluated against an open policy ruleset before execution. Dangerous calls are blocked before they fire. Safe calls proceed normally.

Key capabilities:
- Pre-execution blocking: tool calls intercepted via the before_tool_call hook before execution
- Prompt injection detection: 8 patterns including instruction suppression, jailbreak keywords, base64 payloads
- Credential sniffing alerts: Anthropic API keys, GitHub tokens, AWS credentials
- Out-of-scope write detection: writes to /etc/, ~/.ssh/, LaunchAgents, and other sensitive paths
- Runaway loop detection: repeated tool calls, call floods, read-write cycles, URL hammering
- Data exfiltration detection: credentials in POST bodies, pipe exfiltration, read-then-network patterns
- Tool response injection detection: malicious instructions embedded in tool call results
- YAML policy-as-code: open, auditable rules -- read them, fork them, customize them
- Multi-channel alerts: Telegram, WhatsApp, macOS notifications, terminal, OpenClaw gateway

## Tiers

### Shoofly Basic (Free)
Detects threats and sends notifications. Never blocks. Install and forget -- it runs as a background daemon tailing your OpenClaw session logs.

Install:
```
curl -fsSL https://shoofly.dev/install.sh | bash
```

### Shoofly Advanced ($19/mo)
Two-layer prevention: daemon (monitors + alerts) and hook (intercepts tool calls before they fire). Dangerous calls are blocked -- not detected.

- Daemon: background sidecar that monitors session logs, evaluates threats, fires alerts
- Hook: OpenClaw plugin (shoofly-hook) that intercepts every tool call via before_tool_call and returns a block decision before execution

Install:
```
curl -fsSL https://shoofly.dev/install-advanced.sh | bash
```

## Key Terms

- Tool call interceptor
- Pre-execution blocking
- Agent security
- Prompt injection blocker
- Runtime protection
- OpenClaw security skill
- AI agent firewall
- Blocked -- not detected

- ClawHub (Advanced): https://clawhub.com/skills/shoofly-advanced

- Upgrade to Advanced: https://shoofly.dev/advanced
